comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Implemented the Ralph handshake redesign. Ralph now uses `ralph_continue` and `ralph_finish({ message })`, persists explicit pending decisions instead of the old finalize marker fields, removes the XML completion marker, nudges once on normal child-session stop without a Ralph loop tool, and pauses on a second miss or error/abort. Updated the Ralph skill doc and refreshed schema/repo/adapter/service tests. Verified with `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Follow-up review loop surfaced three edge cases after the initial landing: missing stopReason should only nudge when a usable assistant message exists, finish-banner handling needed disposed-context UI guards in the agent_end path, and tests now explicitly cover stop, missing stopReason, and no-assistant agent_end cases. Re-ran `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate` and obtained review APPROVE after the fixes.
